name: Club
description: Simple Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Light. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 1 SP.

name: Dagger
description: Simple Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d4 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Nick. Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 2 GP.

name: Greatclub
description: Simple Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Properties: Two-Handed. Mastery: Push. Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 2 SP.

name: Handaxe
description: Simple Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d6 Slashing. Properties: Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 5 GP.

name: Javelin
description: Simple Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 30/120). Mastery: Slow. Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 5 SP.

name: Light Hammer
description: Simple Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Nick. Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 2 GP.

name: Mace
description: Simple Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d6 Bludgeoning. Properties: None. Mastery: Sap. Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 5 GP.

name: Quarterstaff
description: Simple Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d6 Bludgeoning. Properties: Versatile (1d8). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 2 SP.

name: Sickle
description: Simple Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d4 Slashing. Properties: Light. Mastery: Nick. Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 1 GP.

name: Spear
description: Simple Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 20/60), Versatile (1d8). Mastery: Sap. Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 1 GP.

name: Dart
description: Simple Ranged Weapon. Damage: 1d4 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Vex. Weight: 1/4 lb. Cost: 5 CP.

name: Light Crossbow
description: Simple Ranged Weapon. Damage: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 80/320; Bolt), Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 25 GP.

name: Shortbow
description: Simple Ranged Weapon. Damage: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 80/320; Arrow), Two-Handed. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 25 GP.

name: Sling
description: Simple Ranged Weapon. Damage: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/120; Bullet). Mastery: Slow. Weight: --. Cost: 1 SP.

name: Battleaxe
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d8 Slashing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 10 GP.

name: Flail
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Properties: None. Mastery: Sap. Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 10 GP.

name: Glaive
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d10 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Graze. Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 20 GP.

name: Greataxe
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d12 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Cleave. Weight: 7 lb. Cost: 30 GP.

name: Greatsword
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 2d6 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Graze. Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 50 GP.

name: Halberd
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d10 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Cleave. Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 20 GP.

name: Lance
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed (unless mounted). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 10 GP.

name: Longsword
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d8 Slashing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Sap. Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 15 GP.

name: Maul
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 2d6 Bludgeoning. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Topple. Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 10 GP.

name: Morningstar
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: None. Mastery: Sap. Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 15 GP.

name: Pike
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Push. Weight: 18 lb. Cost: 5 GP.

name: Rapier
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Finesse. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 25 GP.

name: Scimitar
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d6 Slashing. Properties: Finesse, Light. Mastery: Nick. Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 25 GP.

name: Shortsword
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Light. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 10 GP.

name: Trident
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 20/60), Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 4 lb. Cost: 5 GP.

name: Warhammer
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Push. Weight: 5 lb. Cost: 15 GP.

name: War Pick
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Sap. Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 5 GP.

name: Whip
description: Martial Melee Weapon. Damage: 1d4 Slashing. Properties: Finesse, Reach. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 2 GP.

name: Blowgun
description: Martial Ranged Weapon. Damage: 1 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 25/100; Needle), Loading. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 1 lb. Cost: 10 GP.

name: Hand Crossbow
description: Martial Ranged Weapon. Damage: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/120; Bolt), Light, Loading. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 75 GP.

name: Heavy Crossbow
description: Martial Ranged Weapon. Damage: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 100/400; Bolt), Heavy, Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Push. Weight: 18 lb. Cost: 50 GP.

name: Longbow
description: Martial Ranged Weapon. Damage: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 150/600; Arrow), Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 2 lb. Cost: 50 GP.

name: Musket
description: Martial Ranged Weapon. Damage: 1d12 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 40/120; Bullet), Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 500 GP.

name: Pistol
description: Martial Ranged Weapon. Damage: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/90; Bullet), Loading. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 3 lb. Cost: 250 GP.

name: Padded Armor
description: Light Armor. AC: 11 + Dex modifier. Stealth: Disadvantage. Weight: 8 lb. Cost: 5 GP. Don/Doff: 1 Minute.

name: Leather Armor
description: Light Armor. AC: 11 + Dex modifier. Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 10 GP. Don/Doff: 1 Minute.

name: Studded Leather Armor
description: Light Armor. AC: 12 + Dex modifier. Weight: 13 lb. Cost: 45 GP. Don/Doff: 1 Minute.

name: Hide Armor
description: Medium Armor. AC: 12 + Dex modifier (max 2). Weight: 12 lb. Cost: 10 GP. Don: 5 Minutes, Doff: 1 Minute.

name: Chain Shirt
description: Medium Armor. AC: 13 + Dex modifier (max 2). Weight: 20 lb. Cost: 50 GP. Don: 5 Minutes, Doff: 1 Minute.

name: Scale Mail
description: Medium Armor. AC: 14 + Dex modifier (max 2). Stealth: Disadvantage. Weight: 45 lb. Cost: 50 GP. Don: 5 Minutes, Doff: 1 Minute.

name: Breastplate
description: Medium Armor. AC: 14 + Dex modifier (max 2). Weight: 20 lb. Cost: 400 GP. Don: 5 Minutes, Doff: 1 Minute.

name: Half Plate Armor
description: Medium Armor. AC: 15 + Dex modifier (max 2). Stealth: Disadvantage. Weight: 40 lb. Cost: 750 GP. Don: 5 Minutes, Doff: 1 Minute.

name: Ring Mail
description: Heavy Armor. AC: 14. Stealth: Disadvantage. Weight: 40 lb. Cost: 30 GP. Don: 10 Minutes, Doff: 5 Minutes.

name: Chain Mail
description: Heavy Armor. AC: 16. Strength: 13 required. Stealth: Disadvantage. Weight: 55 lb. Cost: 75 GP. Don: 10 Minutes, Doff: 5 Minutes.

name: Splint Armor
description: Heavy Armor. AC: 17. Strength: 15 required. Stealth: Disadvantage. Weight: 60 lb. Cost: 200 GP. Don: 10 Minutes, Doff: 5 Minutes.

name: Plate Armor
description: Heavy Armor. AC: 18. Strength: 15 required. Stealth: Disadvantage. Weight: 65 lb. Cost: 1,500 GP. Don: 10 Minutes, Doff: 5 Minutes.

name: Shield
description: Shield. AC: +2. Weight: 6 lb. Cost: 10 GP. Don/Doff: Utilize Action.

name: Alchemist's Supplies
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 50 GP. Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Identify a substance (DC 15), or start a fire (DC 15). Craft: Acid, Alchemist's Fire, Component Pouch, Oil, Paper, Perfume.

name: Brewer's Supplies
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 20 GP. Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 9 lb. Utilize: Detect poisoned drink (DC 15), or identify alcohol (DC 10). Craft: Antitoxin.

name: Calligrapher's Supplies
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 10 GP. Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Write text with impressive flourishes that guard against forgery (DC 15). Craft: Ink, Spell Scroll.

name: Carpenter's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 8 GP. Ability: Strength. Weight: 6 lb. Utilize: Seal or pry open a door or container (DC 20). Craft: Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, Barrel, Chest, Ladder, Pole, Portable Ram, Torch.

name: Cartographer's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 15 GP. Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 6 lb. Utilize: Draft a map of a small area (DC 15). Craft: Map.

name: Cobbler's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 5 GP. Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Modify footwear to give Advantage on the wearer's next Dexterity (Acrobatics) check (DC 10). Craft: Climber's Kit.

name: Cook's Utensils
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 1 GP. Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Improve food's flavor (DC 10), or detect spoiled or poisoned food (DC 15). Craft: Rations.

name: Glassblower's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 30 GP. Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Discern what a glass object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15). Craft: Glass Bottle, Magnifying Glass, Spyglass, Vial.

name: Jeweler's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 25 GP. Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Discern a gem's value (DC 15). Craft: Arcane Focus, Holy Symbol.

name: Leatherworker's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 5 GP. Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Add a design to a leather item (DC 10). Craft: Sling, Whip, Hide Armor, Leather Armor, Studded Leather Armor, Backpack, Crossbow Bolt Case, Map or Scroll Case, Parchment, Pouch, Quiver, Waterskin.

name: Mason's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 10 GP. Ability: Strength. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Chisel a symbol or hole in stone (DC 10). Craft: Block and Tackle.

name: Painter's Supplies
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 10 GP. Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Paint a recognizable image of something you've seen (DC 10). Craft: Druidic Focus, Holy Symbol.

name: Potter's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 10 GP. Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 3 lb. Utilize: Discern what a ceramic object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15). Craft: Jug, Lamp.

name: Smith's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 20 GP. Ability: Strength. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Pry open a door or container (DC 20). Craft: Any Melee weapon (except Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, and Whip), Medium armor (except Hide), Heavy armor, Ball Bearings, Bucket, Caltrops, Chain, Crowbar, Firearm Bullets, Grappling Hook, Iron Pot, Iron Spikes, Sling Bullets.

name: Tinker's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 50 GP. Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 10 lb. Utilize: Assemble a Tiny item composed of scrap, which falls apart in 1 minute (DC 20). Craft: Musket, Pistol, Bell, Bullseye Lantern, Flask, Hooded Lantern, Hunting Trap, Lock, Manacles, Mirror, Shovel, Signal Whistle, Tinderbox.

name: Weaver's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 1 GP. Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Mend a tear in clothing (DC 10), or sew a Tiny design (DC 10). Craft: Padded Armor, Basket, Bedroll, Blanket, Fine Clothes, Net, Robe, Rope, Sack, String, Tent, Traveler's Clothes.

name: Woodcarver's Tools
description: Artisan's Tools. Cost: 1 GP. Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Carve a pattern in wood (DC 10). Craft: Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, Ranged weapons (except Pistol, Musket, and Sling), Arcane Focus, Arrows, Bolts, Druidic Focus, Ink Pen, Needles.

name: Disguise Kit
description: Tool. Cost: 25 GP. Ability: Charisma. Weight: 3 lb. Utilize: Apply makeup (DC 10). Craft: Costume.

name: Forgery Kit
description: Tool. Cost: 15 GP. Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Mimic 10 or fewer words of someone else's handwriting (DC 15), or duplicate a wax seal (DC 20).

name: Gaming Set
description: Tool. Cost: Varies. Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20). Variants: Dice (1 SP), Dragonchess (1 GP), Playing Cards (5 SP), Three-Dragon Ante (1 GP).

name: Herbalism Kit
description: Tool. Cost: 5 GP. Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 3 lb. Utilize: Identify a plant (DC 10). Craft: Antitoxin, Candle, Healer's Kit, Potion of Healing.

name: Musical Instrument
description: Tool. Cost: Varies. Ability: Charisma. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). Variants: Bagpipes (30 GP, 6 lb.), Drum (6 GP, 3 lb.), Dulcimer (25 GP, 10 lb.), Flute (2 GP, 1 lb.), Horn (3 GP, 2 lb.), Lute (35 GP, 2 lb.), Lyre (30 GP, 2 lb.), Pan Flute (12 GP, 2 lb.), Shawm (2 GP, 1 lb.), Viol (30 GP, 1 lb.).

name: Navigator's Tools
description: Tool. Cost: 25 GP. Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Plot a course (DC 10), or determine position by stargazing (DC 15).

name: Poisoner's Kit
description: Tool. Cost: 50 GP. Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Detect a poisoned object (DC 10). Craft: Basic Poison.

name: Thieves' Tools
description: Tool. Cost: 25 GP. Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 1 lb. Utilize: Pick a lock (DC 15), or disarm a trap (DC 15).

name: Acid
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 25 GP. Weight: 1 lb. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a vial of Acid. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d6 Acid damage.

name: Alchemist's Fire
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 50 GP. Weight: 1 lb. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Alchemist's Fire. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 1d4 Fire damage and start burning.

name: Antitoxin
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 50 GP. As a Bonus Action, you can drink a vial of Antitoxin to gain Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition for 1 hour.

name: Arcane Focus
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: Varies. An Arcane Focus is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. Crystal (1 lb., 10 GP), Orb (3 lb., 20 GP), Rod (2 lb., 10 GP), Staff (also a Quarterstaff, 4 lb., 5 GP), Wand (1 lb., 10 GP).

name: Backpack
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 GP. Weight: 5 lb. A Backpack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot. It can also serve as a saddlebag.

name: Ball Bearings
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. Weight: 2 lb. As a Utilize action, you can spill Ball Bearings from their pouch. They spread to cover a level, 10-foot-square area within 10 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or have the Prone condition. It takes 10 minutes to recover the Ball Bearings.

name: Barrel
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 GP. Weight: 70 lb. A Barrel holds up to 40 gallons of liquid or up to 4 cubic feet of dry goods.

name: Basket
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 4 SP. Weight: 2 lb. A Basket holds up to 40 pounds within 2 cubic feet.

name: Bedroll
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. Weight: 7 lb. A Bedroll sleeps one Small or Medium creature. While in a Bedroll, you automatically succeed on saving throws against extreme cold.

name: Bell
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. When rung as a Utilize action, a Bell produces a sound that can be heard up to 60 feet away.

name: Blanket
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 SP. Weight: 3 lb. While wrapped in a blanket, you have Advantage on saving throws against extreme cold.

name: Block and Tackle
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. Weight: 5 lb. A Block and Tackle allows you to hoist up to four times the weight you can normally lift.

name: Book
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 25 GP. Weight: 5 lb. A Book contains fiction or nonfiction. If you consult an accurate nonfiction Book about its topic, you gain a +5 bonus to Intelligence (Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion) checks you make about that topic.

name: Bottle, Glass
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 GP. Weight: 2 lb. A Glass Bottle holds up to 1-1/2 pints.

name: Bucket
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 CP. Weight: 2 lb. A Bucket holds up to half a cubic foot of contents.

name: Burglar's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 16 GP. Weight: 42 lb. Contains: Backpack, Ball Bearings, Bell, 10 Candles, Crowbar, Hooded Lantern, 7 flasks of Oil, 5 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.

name: Caltrops
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. Weight: 2 lb. As a Utilize action, you can spread Caltrops to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 1 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn. It takes 10 minutes to recover the Caltrops.

name: Candle
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 CP. For 1 hour, a lit Candle sheds Bright Light in a 5-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 5 feet.

name: Case, Crossbow Bolt
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. Weight: 1 lb. A Crossbow Bolt Case holds up to 20 Bolts.

name: Case, Map or Scroll
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. Weight: 1 lb. A Map or Scroll Case holds up to 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment.

name: Chain
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 GP. Weight: 10 lb. As a Utilize action, you can wrap a Chain around an unwilling creature within 5 feet that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check. If the creature's legs are bound, it has the Restrained condition until it escapes. Escaping requires DC 18 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check. Bursting requires DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check.

name: Chest
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 GP. Weight: 25 lb. A Chest holds up to 12 cubic feet of contents.

name: Climber's Kit
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 25 GP. Weight: 12 lb. Includes boot tips, gloves, pitons, and a harness. As a Utilize action, anchor yourself; you can't fall more than 25 feet from the anchor point, and you can't move more than 25 feet from there without undoing the anchor as a Bonus Action.

name: Clothes, Fine
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 15 GP. Weight: 6 lb. Fine Clothes are made of expensive fabrics. Some events and locations admit only people wearing these clothes.

name: Clothes, Traveler's
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 GP. Weight: 4 lb. Traveler's Clothes are resilient garments designed for travel in various environments.

name: Component Pouch
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 25 GP. Weight: 2 lb. A Component Pouch is watertight and filled with compartments that hold all the free Material components of your spells.

name: Costume
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 GP. Weight: 4 lb. While wearing a Costume, you have Advantage on any ability check you make to impersonate the person or type of person it represents.

name: Crowbar
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 GP. Weight: 5 lb. Using a Crowbar gives you Advantage on Strength checks where the Crowbar's leverage can be applied.

name: Diplomat's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 39 GP. Weight: 39 lb. Contains: Chest, Fine Clothes, Ink, 5 Ink Pens, Lamp, 2 Map or Scroll Cases, 4 flasks of Oil, 5 sheets of Paper, 5 sheets of Parchment, Perfume, and Tinderbox.

name: Druidic Focus
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: Varies. A Druid or Ranger can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. Sprig of Mistletoe (1 GP), Wooden Staff (also a Quarterstaff, 4 lb., 5 GP), Yew Wand (1 lb., 10 GP).

name: Dungeoneer's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 12 GP. Weight: 55 lb. Contains: Backpack, Caltrops, Crowbar, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.

name: Entertainer's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 40 GP. Weight: 58+ lb. Contains: Backpack, Bedroll, Bell, Bullseye Lantern, 3 Costumes, Mirror, 8 flasks of Oil, 9 days of Rations, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.

name: Explorer's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 10 GP. Weight: 55 lb. Contains: Backpack, Bedroll, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.

name: Flask
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 CP. Weight: 1 lb. A Flask holds up to 1 pint.

name: Grappling Hook
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 GP. Weight: 4 lb. As a Utilize action, throw at a railing, ledge, or catch within 50 feet; catches on with a DC 13 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check. If you tied a Rope to the hook, you can then climb it.

name: Healer's Kit
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 GP. Weight: 3 lb. A Healer's Kit has ten uses. As a Utilize action, you can expend one use to stabilize an Unconscious creature that has 0 Hit Points without needing to make a Wisdom (Medicine) check.

name: Holy Symbol
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 GP. A Cleric or Paladin can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. Amulet (worn or held, 1 lb., 5 GP), Emblem (borne on fabric or a Shield, 5 GP), Reliquary (held, 2 lb., 5 GP).

name: Holy Water
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 25 GP. Weight: 1 lb. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Holy Water. Target one creature within 20 feet. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d8 Radiant damage if it is a Fiend or an Undead.

name: Hunting Trap
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 GP. Weight: 25 lb. As a Utilize action, set a Hunting Trap. A creature that steps on the plate must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 1d4 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0. A creature can make a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check to free itself or another creature.

name: Ink
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 10 GP. Ink comes in a 1-ounce bottle, which provides enough ink to write about 500 pages.

name: Ink Pen
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 CP. Using Ink, an Ink Pen is used to write or draw.

name: Jug
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 CP. Weight: 4 lb. A Jug holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Ladder
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 SP. Weight: 25 lb. A Ladder is 10 feet tall. You must climb to move up or down it.

name: Lamp
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 SP. Weight: 1 lb. A Lamp burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.

name: Lantern, Bullseye
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 10 GP. Weight: 2 lb. A Bullseye Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 60-foot Cone and Dim Light for an additional 60 feet.

name: Lantern, Hooded
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 GP. Weight: 2 lb. A Hooded Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. As a Bonus Action, you can lower the hood, reducing the light to Dim Light in a 5-foot radius, or raise it again.

name: Lock
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 10 GP. Weight: 1 lb. A Lock comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can use Thieves' Tools to pick this Lock with a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check.

name: Magnifying Glass
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 100 GP. Grants Advantage on any ability check made to appraise or inspect a highly detailed item. Lighting a fire requires sunlight-bright light, tinder, and about 5 minutes.

name: Manacles
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 GP. Weight: 6 lb. As a Utilize action, bind an unwilling Small or Medium creature within 5 feet that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition (DC 13 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check). While bound, Disadvantage on attack rolls; Restrained if attached to a fixed point. Escape: DC 20 Dex (Sleight of Hand). Burst: DC 25 Str (Athletics). Each set comes with a key.

name: Map
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. If you consult an accurate Map, you gain a +5 bonus to Wisdom (Survival) checks to find your way in the place represented on it.

name: Mirror
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 GP. Weight: 1/2 lb. A handheld steel Mirror useful for personal cosmetics, peeking around corners, and reflecting light as a signal.

name: Net
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. Weight: 3 lb. When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a Net. Target a creature within 15 feet. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or have the Restrained condition until it escapes. Auto-success if Huge or larger. Escape: DC 10 Strength (Athletics) check. Destroying the Net (AC 10; 5 HP; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage) also frees the target.

name: Oil
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 SP. Weight: 1 lb. Dousing: Target must succeed on a Dex save or be covered in oil; if it takes Fire damage before the oil dries (1 minute), it takes an extra 5 Fire damage. Dousing a Space: Pour on 5-foot-square area; if lit, burns for 2 rounds dealing 5 Fire damage to creatures entering or ending their turn there. Fuel: Burns for 6 hours in a Lamp or Lantern.

name: Paper
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 SP. One sheet of Paper can hold about 250 handwritten words.

name: Parchment
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 SP. One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.

name: Perfume
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 GP. Comes in a 4-ounce vial. For 1 hour after applying, you have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks to influence an Indifferent Humanoid within 5 feet.

name: Poison, Basic
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 100 GP. As a Bonus Action, coat one weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition. A creature that takes Piercing or Slashing damage takes an extra 1d4 Poison damage. Retains potency for 1 minute or until its damage is dealt.

name: Pole
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 CP. Weight: 7 lb. A Pole is 10 feet long. You can use it to touch something up to 10 feet away. If you must make a Strength (Athletics) check as part of a High or Long Jump, you can use the Pole to vault, giving yourself Advantage on the check.

name: Pot, Iron
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 GP. Weight: 10 lb. An Iron Pot holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Potion of Healing
description: Adventuring Gear (Magic Item). Cost: 50 GP. Weight: 1/2 lb. As a Bonus Action, you can drink it or administer it to another creature within 5 feet. The creature regains 2d4 + 2 Hit Points.

name: Pouch
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 SP. Weight: 1 lb. A Pouch holds up to 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot.

name: Priest's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 33 GP. Weight: 29 lb. Contains: Backpack, Blanket, Holy Water, Lamp, 7 days of Rations, Robe, and Tinderbox.

name: Quiver
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. Weight: 1 lb. A Quiver holds up to 20 Arrows.

name: Ram, Portable
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 4 GP. Weight: 35 lb. You can use a Portable Ram to break down doors. When doing so, you gain a +4 bonus to the Strength check. One other character can help, giving Advantage.

name: Rations
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 SP. Weight: 2 lb. Rations consist of travel-ready food, including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts.

name: Robe
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. Weight: 4 lb. A Robe has vocational or ceremonial significance. Some events and locations admit only people wearing a Robe bearing certain colors or symbols.

name: Rope
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. Weight: 5 lb. As a Utilize action, tie a knot with a DC 10 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. Can be burst with a DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check. Can bind an unwilling creature that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition. Escaping requires DC 15 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check.

name: Sack
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 CP. Weight: 1/2 lb. A Sack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot.

name: Scholar's Pack
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 40 GP. Weight: 22 lb. Contains: Backpack, Book, Ink, Ink Pen, Lamp, 10 flasks of Oil, 10 sheets of Parchment, and Tinderbox.

name: Shovel
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 GP. Weight: 5 lb. Working for 1 hour, you can dig a hole that is 5 feet on each side in soil or similar material.

name: Signal Whistle
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 CP. When blown as a Utilize action, produces a sound that can be heard up to 600 feet away.

name: Spell Scroll (Cantrip)
description: Adventuring Gear (Magic Item). Cost: 30 GP. Bears the words of a cantrip. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell using its normal casting time without Material components. Spell save DC is 13, attack bonus is +5. The scroll disintegrates when the casting is completed.

name: Spell Scroll (Level 1)
description: Adventuring Gear (Magic Item). Cost: 50 GP. Bears the words of a level 1 spell. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell using its normal casting time without Material components. Spell save DC is 13, attack bonus is +5. The scroll disintegrates when the casting is completed.

name: Spikes, Iron
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. Weight: 5 lb. Iron Spikes come in bundles of ten. As a Utilize action, you can hammer a spike into wood, earth, or similar material to jam a door shut or tie a Rope or Chain to the Spike.

name: Spyglass
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1,000 GP. Weight: 1 lb. Objects viewed through a Spyglass are magnified to twice their size.

name: String
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 SP. String is 10 feet long. You can tie a knot in it as a Utilize action.

name: Tent
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 GP. Weight: 20 lb. A Tent sleeps up to two Small or Medium creatures.

name: Tinderbox
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 5 SP. Weight: 1 lb. A small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a Candle, Lamp, Lantern, or Torch takes a Bonus Action. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.

name: Torch
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 CP. Weight: 1 lb. Burns for 1 hour, casting Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. When you take the Attack action, you can attack with the Torch as a Simple Melee weapon. On a hit, the target takes 1 Fire damage.

name: Vial
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 1 GP. A Vial holds up to 4 ounces.

name: Waterskin
description: Adventuring Gear. Cost: 2 SP. Weight: 5 lb. (full). A Waterskin holds up to 4 pints.

name: Arrows
description: Ammunition. Cost: 1 GP (20). Weight: 1 lb. Storage: Quiver. Used by weapons with the Ammunition (Arrow) property.

name: Bolts
description: Ammunition. Cost: 1 GP (20). Weight: 1-1/2 lb. Storage: Case. Used by weapons with the Ammunition (Bolt) property.

name: Bullets, Firearm
description: Ammunition. Cost: 3 GP (10). Weight: 2 lb. Storage: Pouch. Used by Musket and Pistol.

name: Bullets, Sling
description: Ammunition. Cost: 4 CP (20). Weight: 1-1/2 lb. Storage: Pouch. Used by the Sling.

name: Needles
description: Ammunition. Cost: 1 GP (50). Weight: 1 lb. Storage: Pouch. Used by the Blowgun.

name: Camel
description: Mount. Carrying Capacity: 450 lb. Cost: 50 GP.

name: Elephant
description: Mount. Carrying Capacity: 1,320 lb. Cost: 200 GP.

name: Horse, Draft
description: Mount. Carrying Capacity: 540 lb. Cost: 50 GP.

name: Horse, Riding
description: Mount. Carrying Capacity: 480 lb. Cost: 75 GP.

name: Mastiff
description: Mount. Carrying Capacity: 195 lb. Cost: 25 GP.

name: Mule
description: Mount. Carrying Capacity: 420 lb. Cost: 8 GP.

name: Pony
description: Mount. Carrying Capacity: 225 lb. Cost: 30 GP.

name: Warhorse
description: Mount. Carrying Capacity: 540 lb. Cost: 400 GP.

name: Carriage
description: Drawn Vehicle. Weight: 600 lb. Cost: 100 GP.

name: Cart
description: Drawn Vehicle. Weight: 200 lb. Cost: 15 GP.

name: Chariot
description: Drawn Vehicle. Weight: 100 lb. Cost: 250 GP.

name: Feed
description: Mount Supply. Weight: 10 lb. Cost: 5 CP per day.

name: Saddle, Exotic
description: Tack and Harness. Weight: 40 lb. Cost: 60 GP. Required for riding an aquatic or a flying mount.

name: Saddle, Military
description: Tack and Harness. Weight: 30 lb. Cost: 20 GP. Gives Advantage on any ability check you make to remain mounted.

name: Saddle, Riding
description: Tack and Harness. Weight: 25 lb. Cost: 10 GP.

name: Sled
description: Drawn Vehicle. Weight: 300 lb. Cost: 20 GP.

name: Stabling
description: Service. Cost: 5 SP per day.

name: Wagon
description: Drawn Vehicle. Weight: 400 lb. Cost: 35 GP.

name: Airship
description: Airborne Vehicle. Speed: 8 mph. Crew: 10. Passengers: 20. Cargo: 1 ton. AC: 13. HP: 300. Cost: 40,000 GP.

name: Galley
description: Waterborne Vehicle. Speed: 4 mph. Crew: 80. Cargo: 150 tons. AC: 15. HP: 500. Damage Threshold: 20. Cost: 30,000 GP.

name: Keelboat
description: Waterborne Vehicle. Speed: 1 mph. Crew: 1. Passengers: 6. Cargo: 1/2 ton. AC: 15. HP: 100. Damage Threshold: 10. Cost: 3,000 GP.

name: Longship
description: Waterborne Vehicle. Speed: 3 mph. Crew: 40. Passengers: 150. Cargo: 10 tons. AC: 15. HP: 300. Damage Threshold: 15. Cost: 10,000 GP.

name: Rowboat
description: Waterborne Vehicle. Speed: 1-1/2 mph. Crew: 1. Passengers: 3. AC: 11. HP: 50. Cost: 50 GP.

name: Sailing Ship
description: Waterborne Vehicle. Speed: 2 mph. Crew: 20. Passengers: 20. Cargo: 100 tons. AC: 15. HP: 300. Damage Threshold: 15. Cost: 10,000 GP.

name: Warship
description: Waterborne Vehicle. Speed: 2-1/2 mph. Crew: 60. Passengers: 60. Cargo: 200 tons. AC: 15. HP: 500. Damage Threshold: 20. Cost: 25,000 GP.
